Check_Name: Reconcile Payment vs Booking Final Price
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM bookings b JOIN payments p ON b.booking_id=p.booking_id WHERE b.final_price <> p.amount

Check_Name: Detect Expired Railcard Usage in Active Bookings
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM bookings b JOIN railcards r ON b.railcard_id=r.railcard_id WHERE r.expiry_date < b.created_at

Check_Name: Check Passenger Count vs Ticket Quantity Mismatch
SQL_Query: SELECT b.booking_reference FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN booking_passengers bp ON b.booking_id=bp.booking_id GROUP BY b.booking_reference HAVING b.ticket_quantity <> COUNT(bp.passenger_id)
SELECT first_name, last_name FROM customer_profiles GROUP BY first_name, last_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

Check_Name: Identify Orphan Bookings Without Payment Records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN payments p ON b.booking_id=p.booking_id WHERE p.payment_id IS NULL
